---
title: "Predictive Analytics and Machine Learning Model Review"
subtitle: "Generalization, Metrics, Calibration, Thresholds, Drift, and Governance"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Prediction task

State the target, prediction time, intended use, and acceptable error behavior.

## Model family

Describe the model family, feature representation, and training design.

## Reproducible example

```{python}
models = 5
approved = 1
in_review = 2
needs_revision = 1
planned = 1
print({
    "models": models,
    "approved_share": approved / models,
    "non_approved_share": (in_review + needs_revision + planned) / models
})
```

## Generalization evidence

Document split design, validation logic, and final test protection.

## Metrics and calibration

Review task-appropriate metrics, calibration, and threshold behavior.

## Monitoring

Track drift, production performance, and escalation windows.

## Appendix

Preserve model registry, split records, metric scorecards, threshold policies, leakage checks, and monitoring windows.
